q_quant_rationale: The analysis compares campaign vs non-campaign groups within the data but does not compare the observed value against an expected/baseline/assumed value from the prompt.
q_aware_rationale: The numerical values (12,616.93 vs 9,693.25; 1,834 vs 484) are correctly summarized and a verdict is given (directional finding credible as descriptive evidence, consistent with hypothesis).
